title: calathea lateralis
intro: Calathea lateralis, also known as the 'Neon Pink' or 'Pinstripe Calathea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, characterized by its striking pink and green striped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazonian region, where its leaves are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calathea lateralis include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating, as well as its potential to help manage blood pressure and reduce stress. The leaves can be prepared as a herbal tea, by steeping them in hot water, or used as a poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
